title: Magnets
lyrics:
60 ContributorsTranslationsPortuguêsMagnets LyricsLorde joins Disclosure for a highly anticipated collaboration. “Magnets” was released two days before the release of  Disclosure’s sophomore album, Caracal.
Disclosure spoke about the collaboration in an… Read More 
Never really felt bad about it
As we drank deep from the lie
'Cause I felt melting magnets, babe
The second I saw you through half-shut eyes

Smoke and sunset, off Mulholland
He was talking, I was wonderin' 'bout

Face from heaven, bet the world she don't know
Pretty girls don't know the things that I know
Walk my way, I'll share the things that she won't

Uh-oh, dancing past the point of no return
Let go, we can free ourselves of all we've learned

Let's embrace the point of no return
Let's embrace the point of no return

Never really thought we would make it

Now I don't wanna see the end begin
